title: Google versa al Fisco 326 milioni e la Procura archivia
subtitle: I pm: elusione e non evasione. Il gruppo risarc├ش 300 milioni nel 2017
content: Versando quasi 326 milioni di euro al fisco italiano, Google chiude un contenzioso tributario che era aperto da met├ب del 2023. E a seguito di questo risarcimento e al fatto che sia stata esclusa, dopo tutti gli accertamenti, l'ipotesi di evasione fiscale, la Procura di Milano ha deciso di chiedere l'archiviazione sul fronte penale. Al centro dell'inchiesta, che era venuta a galla lo scorso giugno, c'era la Google Ireland Limited, societ├ب del gruppo californiano. Era stata iscritta una delle responsabili del ramo irlandese. L'indagine del Nucleo di polizia economico finanziaria della Gdf di Milano, coordinata dai pm Giovanna Cavalleri, Giovanni Polizzi e Cristiana Roveda, era nata da un verifica fiscale, poi chiusa "con il verbale di constatazione" nel giugno del 2023 sui "periodi di imposta dal 2015 al 2020". Dagli accertamenti era emerso che la societ├ب irlandese in relazione "alle attivit├ب condotte sul territorio nazionale, aveva omesso la dichiarazione e il versamento delle imposte sui redditi prodotti in Italia", attraverso "una ipotizzata stabile organizzazione occulta di tipo materiale costituita dai server e dall'infrastruttura tecnologica essenziale per il funzionamento dell'omonima piattaforma per l'offerta di servizi digitali". In sostanza, data la presenza in Italia di server e servizi tecnologici, ma anche del personale di Google Italy, si contestava la vendita di spazi pubblicitari con tasse non versate sui ricavi. Inoltre, erano state calcolate le "ritenute che Google Irl avrebbe dovuto applicare sulle royalties corrisposte alle societ├ب estere appartenenti al medesimo gruppo" per "utilizzo e sfruttamento, da parte della stabile organizzazione, di tutti i programmi, algoritmi, marchi e propriet├ب intellettuali costituenti, nel loro complesso, la tecnologia Google". Si ├ذ trattato, per├▓, di "una condotta", hanno scritto i pm nell'istanza di archiviazione, che non ha violato "alcuna norma tributaria" ma ne ha eluso "l'applicazione", ossia di profili di presunta elusione fiscale o "abuso del diritto" e non di evasione. E data la "presenza" di "elementi di incertezza interpretativa" e pure "le peculiarit├ب della presente vicenda", per la Procura ├ذ impossibile, cos├ش si legge nell'atto, "formulare una ragionevole prognosi di condanna con riferimento alle ipotesi di reato". Nel frattempo, sul fronte tributario, sia pure "dissentendo sul piano tecnico" dalle conclusioni dell'Agenzia delle Entrate, Google ha accettato "di definire la controversia" versando il 14 novembre scorso quasi 326 milioni, di cui oltre 265 "per omesse ritenute su royalties (comprese sanzioni ed interessi)" e oltre 60 milioni "a titolo di Ires ed Irap (comprese sanzioni ed interessi)". L'indagine su Google definita con richiesta di archiviazione, che ora dovr├ب essere valutata da un gip, ├ذ solo una delle tante inchieste aperte negli ultimi anni dalla Procura milanese su colossi del web e dell'high tech e che hanno riguardato profili fiscali e imposte evase e spesso sono finite con transazioni per centinaia di milioni di euro. La stessa web company californiana aveva gi├ب risarcito il Fisco nel 2017 con 306 milioni, chiudendo cos├ش le pendenze tributarie e sanando situazioni dei 15 anni precedenti. Simile a quella su Google era l'indagine che vedeva al centro Netflix, che nel maggio del 2022 ha pagato oltre 55 milioni di euro in un'unica soluzione al Fisco e ha aperto una sede operativa in Italia. Il "modello Milano", ossia la "sinergia operativa" nelle diverse fasi "di verifica fiscale", di "accertamento dei tributi e "indagini penali", aveva spiegato pochi giorni fa il procuratore Marcello Viola, ha permesso "negli ultimi 3 anni di recuperare risorse a beneficio della collettivit├ب per circa 2 miliardi di euro". en_title: Google deposits at the Fisco 326 million and the Procura archiving
en_content: By paying almost ظéش326 million to the Italian tax, Google closes a tax litigation that was opened in mid-2023. And as a result of this compensation and the fact that, after all the investigations, the hypothesis of tax avoidance, the Prosecutor of Milan decided to ask for the archiving on the criminal front. At the center of the investigation, which had come to afloat last June, there was the Google Ireland Limited, Californian group company. It was one of the leaders of the Irish branch. The investigation of the Financial Economic Police of the Gdf of Milan, coordinated by the peers Giovanna Cavalleri, Giovanni Polizzi and Cristiana Roveda, was born from a fiscal verification, then closed "with the record of finding" in June 2023 on the "setperiods from 2015 to 2020". From the investigations it emerged that the Irish company in relation to "the activities carried out on the national territory, had omitted the statement and the payment of taxes on income produced in Italy", through "an assumed stable occult organization of material type constituted by the servers and the technological infrastructure essential for the operation of the homonymous platform for the supply of digital services". In essence, given the presence in Italy of servers and technological services, but also of the staff of Google Italy, it was disputed the sale of advertising spaces with taxes not paid on revenues. In addition, the "retention that Google Irl should have applied on royalties to foreign companies belonging to the same group" for "use and exploitation, by the stable organization, of all programs, algorithms, trademarks and intellectual property, as a whole, Google technology". It was, however, "a conduct", wrote the pm in the storage instance, which did not violate "some tax norm" but evaded "the application", i.e. profiles of alleged tax elusion or "abuse of law" and not of evasion. And given the "presence" of "elements of interpretative uncertainty" and also "the peculiarities of this affair", for the Procura it is impossible, so read in the act, "formulate a reasonable prognosis of condemnation with reference to the hypotheses of crime". Meanwhile, on the tributary front, as well as "disentering on the technical level" from the conclusions of the Agenzia delle Entrate, Google has accepted "to define the dispute" by paying almost 326 million on 14 November, of which more than 265 "for omitted held on royalties (including sanctions and interests)" and more than 60 million "for Ires and Irap (including sanctions and interests)". The Google survey defined with storage request, which will now have to be evaluated by a gip, is only one of the many investigations opened in recent years by the Milanese prosecutor on web and high tech colossi and that have covered tax profiles and tax evaded and often ended with transactions for hundreds of millions of euros. The Californian web company had already compensated Fisco in 2017 with 306 million, thus closing the tributary slopes and healing situations of the previous 15 years. Similar to that on Google it was the investigation that he saw in the Netflix center, which in May 2022 paid over 55 million euros in a single solution to the Fisco and opened a headquarters in Italy. The "Milan model", that is the "operational approach" in the different phases "of fiscal verification", of "identification of the tributes and " criminal investigations", had explained a few days ago the prosecutor Marcello Viola, has allowed "in the last 3 years to recover resources for the benefit of the community for about 2 billion euros". Reproduction reserved ┬ر Copyright ANSA
en_subtitle: I pm: elusion and non-evasion. The group earned 300 million in 2017

title: Meloni: 'Risorse record alla sanit├ب con 1,3 miliardi agli ospedali'
subtitle: 30 milioni per i compensi a specializzandi non medici
content: . Con gli Accordi di Coesione stipulati in questi anni con le Regioni abbiamo messo a disposizione, inoltre, un miliardo e 300 milioni di euro per investimenti negli ospedali e con la revisione del PNRR abbiamo liberato ulteriori 750 milioni da investire sempre sulla sanit├ب". Cosi "Dopo decenni di attesa - ha poi continuato - abbiamo voluto compiere una piccola ma grande rivoluzione, sostenendo un emendamento parlamentare che chiedeva di stanziare 30 milioni di euro per riconoscere un compenso agli specializzandi di area non medica. Mi riferisco a professionisti come farmacisti, psicologi, biologi, odontoiatri, chimici, fisici e veterinari che finora non avevano beneficiato n├ر di un percorso formativo ben delineato, n├ر di un adeguato riconoscimento". "L'Italia pu├▓ vantare un'infrastruttura di eccellenza come il Servizio Sanitario Nazionale e le professioni sanitarie rappresentano la colonna portante di questo sistema, che ├ذ nostro dovere proteggere, valorizzare e rafforzare"┬ب ha aggiunto Meloni, sottolineando come le professioni sanitarie e sociosanitarie contribuiscano "ad assicurare alla nostra sanit├ب quelle caratteristiche di universalit├ب, uguaglianza e solidariet├ب che tutto il mondo ci invidia". Riproduzione riservata ┬ر Copyright ANSA
en_title: Meloni: Health records with 1.3 billion to hospitals
en_content: . With the Cohesion Agreements stipulated in recent years with the Regions we have also made available a billion and 300 million euros for investments in hospitals and with the revision of the PNRR we have freed further 750 million to invest always on health". So "After decades of waiting - he continued - we wanted to make a small but great revolution, supporting a parliamentary amendment that asked to allocate 30 million euros to recognize a compensation to non-medical area residents. I refer to professionals such as pharmacists, psychologists, biologists, dentists, chemists, physicists and veterinarians who so far had not benefited from a well-defined formative path, nor of adequate recognition." "Italy can boast an infrastructure of excellence such as the National Health Service and health professions represent the pillar of this system, which is our duty to protect, value and strengthen" added Meloni, underlining how health and social professions contribute "to ensure to our health those characteristics of universality, equality and solidarity that the whole world envies us". title: Notte serena per il Papa, poi colazione in poltrona
subtitle: Lo comunica la Sala stampa della Santa Sede
content: "La notte ├ذ trascorsa serena, il Papa si ├ذ alzato e ha fatto colazione in poltrona". Lo comunica la Sala stampa della Santa Sede. Papa Francesco, al suo settimo giorno di ricovero al Policlinico Gemelli, "prosegue le cure ed anche l'attivit├ب lavorativa". Lo si apprende da fonti vaticane, secondo cui, in forma ovviamente compatibile con la malattia e la degenza ospedaliera, "continua l'attivit├ب, cio├ذ la lettura e la firma di documenti, colloqui telefonici o con gli stretti collaboratori". Al momento le condizioni del Pontefice restano "stazionarie". Nel tardo pomeriggio di oggi sar├ب diffuso un nuovo bollettino con gli aggiornamenti medici. "Facciamo i migliori auguri al Santo Padre. Sicuramente ├ذ assistito in un ospedale di eccellenza e speriamo che risolva il prima possibile i suoi problemi respiratori". Cos├ش il ministro della salute Orazio Schillaci a margine della giornata nazionale del personale sanitario e sociosanitario. "Siamo tutti preoccupati per il Papa ma le cose che si dicono sono esattamente quelle che avvengono. Il fatto che il Papa abbia fatto colazione, abbia letto i giornali, abbia ricevuto delle persone vuol dire che siamo nella direzione giusta di un pieno recupero, che speriamo avvenga presto". Riproduzione riservata ┬ر Copyright ANSA
en_title: Evening night for the Pope, then breakfast in armchair
en_content: "The night is spent serene, the Pope rose and made breakfast in the armchair." The Holy See Press Office communicates this. Pope Francis, on his seventh day of hospitalization at the Policlinico Gemelli, "follows care and also work". It is learned from Vatican sources, according to which, in a form of course compatible with the disease and hospital decency, "the activity continues, that is, reading and signing documents, telephone conversations or with close collaborators". At the moment the conditions of the Pontiff remain "state". In the late afternoon of today a new bulletin will be released with medical updates. "We wish the Holy Father best. Surely he is assisted in a hospital of excellence and we hope he will solve his respiratory problems as soon as possible". Thus the Minister of Health Orazio Schillaci on the edge of the national day of health and social care. "We are all worried about the Pope but the things that are said are exactly what happens. The fact that the Pope had breakfast, read the newspapers, received people means that we are in the right direction of full recovery, which we hope will happen soon." Reproduction reserved ┬ر Copyright ANSA
en_subtitle: The Holy See Press Office

title: Medio Oriente, Hamas espone le bare degli ostaggi morti sul palco a Gaza
subtitle: Le salme dei quattro israeliani, Shiri Bibas, i due figli Kfir e Ariel, e l'84enne Oded Lipshitz, sono state consegnate poi dalla Croce Rossa all'Idf
content: Le salme di Shiri Bibas, i due figli Kfir e Ariel, e dell'84enne Oded Lipshitz, sono state consegnate da Hamas alla Croce Rossa e poi all'Idf. 10:11 Mentre le salme dei quattro ostaggi venivano esposte sul palco allestito da Hamas a Khan Younis, la folla riunita in piazza degli ostaggi a Tel Aviv ha assistito alla proiezione su un grande schermo di filmati della famiglia Bibas e di Oded Lifshitz, ripresi prima del loro rapimento. I media israeliani oggi non hanno trasmesso le immagini in diretta di al Jazeera del rilascio per rispetto ai defunti e alle famiglie. 09:37 "Questo ├ذ un momento di angoscia e dolore. Il cuore di un intero popolo ├ذ in frantumi. A nome dello Stato di Israele, chino la testa e chiedo perdono. Mi dispiace di non aver adempiuto al nostro dovere. Mi dispiace di non avervi protetti in quel giorno maledetto. Mi dispiace di non avervi riportato a casa sani e salvi. Che la loro memoria sia benedetta". Lo ha dichiarato il presidente israeliano Isaac Herzog. 09:27 L'ufficio del primo ministro rende noto che "Israele ha ricevuto dalla Croce Rossa le bare di quattro ostaggi caduti. Le bare sono state trasferite alle forze di difesa israeliane (Idf) e al servizio di sicurezza dello stato (Shin Bet), all'interno dell'area della Striscia di Gaza, da dove saranno trasferite in Israele al Centro Nazionale di Medicina Legale del Ministero della Salute. Al termine del processo di identificazione, verr├ب inviata una comunicazione ufficiale alle famiglie". "Le famiglie degli ostaggi sono state aggiornate e in questo momento difficile, il nostro cuore ├ذ con loro. Si chiede al pubblico di rispettare la privacy delle famiglie e di evitare di diffondere voci e informazioni non ufficiali e non verificate", aggiunge la nota. 09:09 L'Idf ha ricevuto dalla Croce Rossa la conferma che i corpi di quattro ostaggi morti sono stati consegnati. La Croce Rossa sta ora portando le salme alle forze dell'Idf e dello Shin Bet all'interno di Gaza, dove si terr├ب una breve cerimonia militare. I corpi saranno poi portati in Israele per l'identificazione. 09:02 Hamas ha annunciato che questa settimana saranno scarcerati 602 detenuti palestinesi nello scambio con ostaggi israeliani vivi e morti. In 445 di loro sono residenti della Striscia arrestati dopo il 7 ottobre, gli altri, che saranno rilasciati sabato, sono 50 condannati all'ergastolo, 60 condannati a lunghe pene detentive e 47 rilasciati nell'ambito dell'accordo Shalit. 08:49 Le bare con i corpi di quattro ostaggi israeliani uccisi sono state consegnate da Hamas alla Croce Rossa a Khan Younis, nella striscia di Gaza meridionale, di fronte a una grande folla di palestinesi. La Croce Rossa porter├ب i corpi alle truppe dell'IDF a Gaza. Dopo aver ricevuto i corpi, l'esercito eseguir├ب una breve cerimonia militare guidata dal rabbino dell'Idf Eyal Karim, prima di portare gli ostaggi uccisi all'istituto forense Abu Kabir per l'identificazione. Il processo di identificazione potrebbe richiedere fino a 48 ore. 08:43 Hamas ha esposto le foto dei quattro ostaggi morti di cui restituir├ب i corpi oggi sul palco allestito a Khan Younis - i bambini Bibas, la madre e Oded Lipshitz - con il primo ministro Netanyahu raffigurato sopra di loro come un vampiro assetato di sangue. La didascalia recita: "Il criminale di guerra li ha assassinati con i missili degli aerei da caccia". Sullo sfondo immagini di bare coperte da bandiere israeliane: "Ritorno alla guerra, ritorno dei rapiti nelle bare". 08:30 Hamas ha esposto quattro bare con i corpi degli ostaggi morti sul palco allestito a Khan Younis prima della consegna alla Croce Rossa, come mostrano le immagini trasmesse dal al Jazeera. I veicoli della Croce Rossa sono arrivati al punto di incontro. Da non perdere
en_title: Middle East, Hamas exposes the coffins of dead hostages on stage in Gaza
en_content: The Psalms of Shiri Bibas, the two sons Kfir and Ariel, and the 84-year-old Oded Lipshitz, were delivered by Hamas to the Red Cross and then to the Idf. 10:11 While the psalms of the four hostages were exposed on the stage set up by Hamas to Khan Younis, the crowd gathered in the square of the hostages in Tel Aviv witnessed the projection on a large screen of movies of the Bibas family The Israeli media today did not broadcast live images of the Jazeera release for respect to the dead and families. 09:37 "This is a moment of anguish and pain. The heart of a whole people is shattered. On behalf of the State of Israel, I ask for forgiveness. I'm sorry I didn't fulfill our duty. I'm sorry I didn't protect you on that damn day. I'm sorry I didn't bring you home safely. May their memory be blessed." Israeli President Isaac Herzog said so. 09:27 The Prime Minister's office notes that "Israel received four hostages from the Red Cross. The coffins were transferred to the Israeli defence forces (Idf) and to the state security service (Shin Bet), within the Gaza Strip area, from where they will be transferred to Israel to the National Medical Center of the Ministry of Health. At the end of the identification process, an official communication will be sent to families." "The families of the hostages have been updated and at this difficult time, our heart is with them. It asks the public to respect the privacy of families and to avoid spreading unofficial and unverified voices and information," he adds. 09:09 The Idf received from the Red Cross confirmation that the bodies of four dead hostages were delivered. The Red Cross is now bringing the psalms to the forces of Idf and Shin Bet within Gaza, where a short military ceremony will be held. The bodies will then be brought to Israel for identification. 09:02 Hamas announced that this week 602 Palestinian prisoners will be discarded in exchange with Israeli hostages alive and dead. In 445 of them are residents of the Strip arrested after October 7, the others, which will be released on Saturday, are 50 sentenced to life, 60 sentenced to long prison sentences and 47 issued under the Shalit agreement. 08:49 The coffins with the bodies of four Israeli hostages killed were delivered by Hamas to the Red Cross to Khan Younis, in the southern Gaza Strip, in front of a large crowd of Palestinians. The Red Cross will bring the bodies to the IDF troops in Gaza. After receiving the bodies, the army will perform a short military ceremony led by the rabbi of Idf Eyal Karim, before bringing the hostages killed to the Abu Kabir forensic institute for identification. The identification process may take up to 48 hours. 08:43 Hamas has exposed the photos of the four dead hostages whose bodies will return today on stage set up in Khan Younis - the children Bibas, the mother and Oded Lipshitz - with Prime Minister Netanyahu depicted above them as a bloodthirsty vampire. The caption says: "The war criminal murdered them with the missiles of the fighter planes." In the background images of coffins covered by Israeli flags: "Back to the war, return of the abducted in the coffins." 08:30 Hamas exhibited four coffins with the bodies of the dead hostages on stage set up in Khan Younis before the Red Cross, as shown by the images transmitted by the Jazeera. Red Cross vehicles arrived at the meeting point. Not to be missed
en_subtitle: The psalms of the four Israelis, Shiri Bibas, the two sons Kfir and Ariel, and the 84-year-old Oded Lipshitz, were then delivered from the Red Cross to the Idf

title: Cina agli Usa: 'Rispetto reciproco per l'accordo sul commercio'
subtitle: Trump: 'Un accordo commerciale con la Cina ├ذ possibile'. L'affondo, dazi al 25% su auto, farmaci e chip. Stretta attesa ad aprile, tremano i marchi europei e giapponesi
content: La Cina sollecita gli Stati Uniti al "rispetto reciproco" in merito ai commenti del presidente americano Donald Trump secondo cui "un accordo commerciale con Pechino ├ذ possibile". E' quanto ha commentato sulla vicenda il portavoce del ministero degli Esteri Guo Jiakun, aggiungendo che "le due parti dovrebbero risolvere le loro preoccupazioni attraverso il dialogo e le consultazioni basate su eguaglianza e rispetto reciproco". Il ministero del Commercio cinese ha esortato gli Stati Uniti a non brandire il "grande bastone dei dazi" contro Pechino, mentre il presidente americano Donald Trump si appresta a lanciare nuove misure radicali sul fronte dell'interscambio commerciale per colpire alleati e avversari. "La parte cinese esorta quella statunitense a non brandire il grande bastone delle tariffe a ogni pi├ذ sospinto, usando i dazi come strumento per esercitare coercizioni ovunque", ha commentato il portavoce del ministero He Yadong, parlando nel briefing settimanale. Per il presidente statunitense Donald Trump "un accordo commerciale con Pechino ├ذ possibile". Lo ha detto parlando alla stampa sull'aereo presidenziale. Washington ha da poco imposto dazi doganali aggiuntivi del 10% su tutti i prodotti importati dalla Cina dall'inizio di febbraio. Trump ha poi aggiunto che "nel 2020 gli Stati Uniti avevano gi├ب concluso un eccellente accordo commerciale con la Cina" e ora un nuovo trattato "├ذ possibile". La guerra commerciale di Donald Trump si allarga a macchia d'olio. Dopo i dazi sull'acciaio e l'alluminio e quelli reciproci, il presidente americano lancia l'affondo e spiana la strada a tariffe al 25% per le auto, i prodotti farmaceutici e i chip.  Riproduzione riservata ┬ر Copyright ANSA
en_title: China to the USA: 'Reference for mutual agreement on trade'
en_content: China urges the United States to " reciprocal respect" regarding the comments of US President Donald Trump that "a trade agreement with Beijing is possible". This is what the Foreign Ministry spokesman Guo Jiakun commented on, adding that "the two parties should solve their concerns through dialogue and consultations based on equality and mutual respect". The Chinese Ministry of Trade urged the United States not to brand the "big stick of duties" against Beijing, while American President Donald Trump is preparing to launch new radical measures on the front of the commercial exchange to strike allies and opponents. "The Chinese part exhorts the American one not to brand the big stick of tariffs to each pi├ذ sospinto, using duties as a tool for exercising coercion everywhere", said the spokesman of the ministry He Yadong, speaking in the weekly briefing. For US President Donald Trump "a trade deal with Beijing is possible". He said that at the press on the presidential plane. Washington has recently imposed additional customs duties of 10% on all products imported from China since early February. Trump added that "in 2020 the United States had already concluded an excellent trade agreement with China" and now a new treaty "is possible". Donald Trump's trade war expands to oil stain. After the duties on steel and aluminium and reciprocal ones, the American president launches the background and paves the way at tariffs to 25% for cars, pharmaceutical products and chips.
en_subtitle: Trump: 'A trade agreement with China is possible'. The background, 25% duties on cars, drugs and chips. Standing in April, European and Japanese brands tremble

title: Intuitive annuncia lظآintenzione di stabilire una presenza diretta in Italia, Spagna e Portogallo
content: L'acquisizione dell'attivit├ب di distribuzione amplia l'investimento e la presenza di Intuitive in Europa SUNNYVALE, California, 21 gennaio 2025 -- Intuitive (NASDAQ:ISRG), leader a livello globale nelle tecnologie per le terapie mininvasive e pioniera della chirurgia robotica, ha annunciato oggi che intende stabilire una presenza diretta in Italia, Spagna, Portogallo, Malta e San Marino e relativi territori tramite l'acquisizione delle attivit├ب di distribuzione dei sistemi da Vinci e Ion in questi Paesi. Intuitive ha stipulato un accordo, soggetto ad approvazione normativa, con gli attuali distributori delle tecnologie Intuitive ab medica, Abex, Excelencia Robotica e le loro affiliate, per acquisire le attivit├ب legate ai prodotti Intuitive. La transazione sar├ب completata nel 2026, una volta ottenute le necessarie autorizzazioni e soddisfatto le condizioni di chiusura. "Intuitive ├ذ entusiasta di continuare a investire nella significativa opportunit├ب di offrire cure sicure e mininvasive a un maggior numero di pazienti in tutta Europa", ha affermato il CEO di Intuitive Gary Guthart. "La presenza diretta in Italia, Spagna, Portogallo, Malta e San Marino e relativi territori ci consentir├ب di approfondire la nostra conoscenza delle esigenze specifiche dei clienti in questi Paesi." In seguito alla chiusura dell'accordo nel 2026, le attivit├ب relative ai sistemi da Vinci e Ion di ab medica, Abex ed Excelencia Robotica saranno interamente controllate da Intuitive e le operazioni aziendali saranno integrate nell'organizzazione commerciale e di marketing europea di Intuitive, guidata dal Vice Presidente Senior e General Manager Dirk Barten. "Non vediamo l'ora di integrare questi team al momento della chiusura dellظآaccordo", prosegue Barten. "Lo sviluppo di rapporti diretti con i clienti in questi Paesi ├ذ fondamentale per garantire ai pazienti un maggiore accesso alle cure mininvasive." ظ£Siamo orgogliosi di aver introdotto la chirurgia robotica pi├╣ di due decenni fa, in Italia e nel Sud Europa, credendo nel da Vinci fin dalla sua nascita fino a diventarne uno dei primi distributori al mondo. Nel 2026 continueremo il nostro percorso di innovazione al servizio dei pazienti, della cura e degli operatori sanitari ظô dichiara Francesca Cerruti -CEO di ab medica ظô. In questi quarantظآanni ci siamo consolidati come distributori delle maggiori tecnologie applicate a numerose specialit├ب cliniche e siamo diventati produttori di soluzioni e servizi per la smart&digital health. Proseguiremo il nostro percorso senza dimenticare di ringraziare tutti coloro che in questi anni hanno creduto insieme a noi nella chirurgia robotica da Vinci e Intuitive per la pluriennale fiducia accordataciظإ, conclude Cerruti. ###  Informazioni su Intuitive Surgical, Inc. Informazioni sui sistemi chirurgici da Vinci Informazioni sul sistema endoluminale Ion Le informazioni fornite dal sistema endoluminale Ion o dai suoi componenti devono essere considerate puramente indicative e non sostituiscono le decisioni cliniche prese da un medico qualificato. Per maggiori informazioni, consultare il sito Web dell'azienda www.intuitive.com. Informazioni importanti sulla sicurezza Dichiarazioni previsionali Il presente comunicato stampa potrebbe contenere stime e previsioni da cui i risultati effettivi potrebbero differire. ┬ر 2025 Intuitive Surgical Operations, Inc. Tutti i diritti riservati. I nomi/i loghi di prodotti e brand sono marchi o marchi registrati di Intuitive Surgical o dei rispettivi proprietari.
en_title: Intuitive announces the intention to establish a direct presence in Italy, Spain and Portugal
en_content: The acquisition of distribution activity expands the investment and presence of Intuitives in Europe SUNNYVALE, California, 21 January 2025 -- Intuitive (NASDAQ:ISRG), a global leader in technologies for mininvasive therapies and pioneer of robotic surgery, today announced that it intends to establish a direct presence in Italy, Spain, Portugal, Malta and San Marino and its territories through the acquisition of systems Vincion Intuitive concluded an agreement, subject to regulatory approval, with current distributors of Intuitive Abmedical Technologies, Abex, Excelencia Robotica and their affiliates, to acquire activities related to Intuitive Products. The transaction will be completed in 2026, once obtained the necessary authorizations and satisfied the closing conditions. "Intuitive is excited to continue investing in the significant opportunity to offer safe and mininvasive care to a greater number of patients across Europe," said Intuitive CEO Gary Guthart. "The direct presence in Italy, Spain, Portugal, Malta and San Marino and its territories will allow us to deepen our knowledge of the specific needs of customers in these countries." Following the conclusion of the agreement in 2026, activities related to Vinci and Ion medical systems, Abex and Excelencia Robotica will be entirely controlled by Intuitive and business operations will be integrated into the European Intuitive Commercial and Marketing Organization, led by Senior Vice President and General Manager Dirk Barten. "We look forward to integrating these teams at the time of closing the deal," continues Barten. "Development of direct relationships with customers in these countries is essential to guarantee patients greater access to mininvasive care." ظ£We are proud to have introduced robotic surgery more than two decades ago, in Italy and South Europe, believing in the da Vinci since its birth to become one of the first distributors in the world. In 2026 we will continue our path of innovation to the service of patients, care and health professionals ظô says Francesca Cerruti -CEO of medical ab ظô. Over the past 40 years we have established ourselves as distributors of the major technologies applied to numerous clinical specialties and have become manufacturers of solutions and services for smart&digital health. We will continue our journey without forgetting to thank all those who have believed together with us in the robotic surgery da Vinci and Intuitive for the many years of trust accorded to us", concludes Cerruti. ### Information about Intuitive Surgical, Inc. Information on surgical systems from Vinci Information on endoluminal system Ion Information provided by the Ion endoluminal system or its components must be considered purely indicative and do not replace clinical decisions taken by a qualified doctor. For more information, see the company's website www.intuitive.com. title: ELATEC Strengthens Global Presence with Regional Hub in Dubai
content: Puchheim, January 23, 2025 ظô ELATEC, a leading global provider of user authentication and identification solutions, is beginning 2025 with a significant step forward in its global expansion strategy: the launch of its new office in Dubai. Operating under the name ELATEC Middle East Trading FZE, this new location will serve as a dedicated hub to support the companyظآs growing customer base and partners across the Middle East. The operations, led by Managing Director Carsten Hoersch, are set to drive innovative, secure, and tailored access control solutions in the region. title: New Year in Chengdu: Feast of Science Fiction, Intangible Cultural Heritage, and Eastern Aesthetics
content: Chengdu, China┬ب- In the ancient towns of Chengdu, fish lanterns parade through the streets and fireworks light up the night sky; in the urban center, cutting-edge technology blends the ancient with the modern. From the sci-fi spectacles of today to the enduring charm of intangible cultural heritage and the elegance of Eastern aesthetics, Chengdu pulses with vitality. ظ£Open the Jinmen Gate!ظإ The cry rings out, accompanied by the beat of drums in the Jinmen Scenic Area of Xindu District. The festive atmosphere of the Chinese New Year spills out from the lively street scenes. Nearly 100 banquets of ظ£Nine Bowlsظإظ¤a traditional and distinctive Sichuan feastظ¤are laid out in a row, with steam rising from the dishes in the cold winter. The rich aroma of meat mingles with the savory, spicy notes of fermented broad bean paste, filling the air. The authentic ظ£Sichuan flavorظإ is impossible to resist at this banquet, celebrating the Chinese New Year with a tribute to intangible cultural heritage. This marks the first Spring Festival since the Chinese New Year was added to the Representative List of UNESCOظآs Intangible Cultural Heritage of Humanity in December of last year. To celebrate this achievement, Chengduظآs cultural inheritors showcase their crafts. On quincuncial piles, lion dancers leap and twirl in celebration of the New Year. At the sugar painting stalls, children watch in wide-eyed wonder as artisans skillfully create dragon and phoenix designs, forming sweet childhood memories. Young women, dressed in traditional hanfu garments with head-pinned flowers and holding fish lanterns, stroll in groups beneath the night sky. Meanwhile, molten iron fireworks shoot into the airظ¤a fiery spectacle exclusive to Chengdu, burning at a searing 1,600 degrees Celsius. At the Wenshufang Street Intangible Cultural Heritage Chinese New Year Goods Shopping Festival, the spirit of the New Year is woven seamlessly into shopping. A dazzling array of specialty goodsظ¤from handmade sugar paintings and Shu brocade sachets to cured meat and sausagesظ¤lines the streets. Tourists carrying red paper bags, browse and select goods with joy on their faces, radiating the happiness of the holiday season. This street, brimming with New Yearظآs cheer, reflects not only the inheritance of tradition but also a celebration of everyday life. At the Chengdu Science Fiction Museum, the ظ£Ancient Shu Kingdom Looks at Todayظآs Pidu: Sci-Fi Chinese New Yearظإ Nebula Magic Night is in full swing. The highlight, the ظ£Golden Snake Fire Danceظإ drone show, transforms the night sky with a massive spaceship that glows with cool blue and blazing white light, as though it is traveling from the present straight into the future. In addition, the ظ£Sparkling Fireظإ fire pot performance symbolizes the removal of evil and the blessing of peace, while the ظ£Interstellar Travelظإ concert, with its passionate performances, leaves the audience wondering whether they are witnessing the present or the future. Culture is the lifeblood of a city. In 2024, Chengdu harnessed culture to drive economic vitality, enrich urban life, benefit its people, and promote cultural exchange. Through a series of cultural events, the city has fostered a spiritual home for its citizens, contributing to the ongoing construction of a world-class cultural city. For the 2025 Spring Festival, Chengdu is celebrating under the theme ظ£Vibrant Chengdu Year, Countless New Beginnings,ظإ launching 12 major tourism and cultural events, along with over 1,000 special activities across 13 categories. The Chinese New Year in Chengdu is not only a fusion of fireworks and blooming flowers but also a dazzling showcase of the cityظآs cultural vitality.  Picture1:┬بThe "Ancient Shu Kingdom Looks at Today's Pidu: Sci-Fi Chinese New Year" Nebula Magic Night is in full swing Source: City of Chengdu

title: CO.DON GmbH partners in EU-Funded Project to Advance 3D Bioprinting for Tissue Regeneration
content: Teltow, 05. February 2025 ظô The EU-funded micro2MACRO (m2M) project, launched in December 2024, aims to advance tissue regeneration through an innovative bioprinting platform.     CO.DON develops, produces and distributes autologous cell therapies for the minimally invasive repair of cartilage defects. The product being marketed is a cell therapy product for the minimally invasive treatment of cartilage damage in the knee joint that uses only the patient's own cartilage cells. More than 20,000 patients have already been treated with CO.DON's method. In January 2023, CO.DON GmbH was acquired by ReLive Biotechnologies, a global company headquartered in the US.  Contact

title: Germany "rested on its laurels" too long, report finds
content: Los Angeles/DNA ظô High levels of governance have masked a slow decline in Germany, with political, economic, and social fractures "festering over years", a new scientific report released only weeks ahead of the February 23 parliamentary elections concludes. "It has become clear that Germany rested on its laurels for far too long", the BGI Germany Report on the countryظآs governance performance says. It is based on the Berggruen Governance Index (BGI) and was conducted by researchers from the Los Angeles-based Berggruen Institute think tank, the Luskin School of Public Affairs at the University of California Los Angeles (UCLA), and the Hertie School, a German university. In their report "Germany 2025 - Slow decline in governance performance erupts into crisis of government as geopolitics worsen" the researchers conclude that the countryظآs government and administrative systems have appeared increasingly sclerotic and hesitant to adopt necessary changes. Effective, often painful reforms are urgently needed, but political and economic constraints make them difficult to implement, the researchers write. The 2024 BGI measures democratic accountability, delivery of public goods and state capacity on a scale from 0 to 100. It analyses the years from 2000 to 2021. According to the report, Germany has lost ground on all three measures, with structural problems festering since the "deceptively benign" years of the chancellorship of Angela Merkel (2005-2021). The Democracy Accountability Index score, for example, slid to 93 in 2021 from a near perfect 99 at the beginning of the century. The data "suggests that some of Germanyظآs state capacity and democratic accountability challenges were masked by economic growth, driven by the success of its export-oriented model during the 2010s", the report says. Chief among Germanyظآs challenges are economic troubles that have worsened in recent years, largely stemming from a lack of public investment during that period in areas such as digitalization and transport infrastructure. On February 23, Germans go to the polls early after the ruling three-party coalition consisting of the Social Democrats (SPD), the Greens and the liberal Free Democrats (FDP) collapsed in November. Intra-government fighting over how to get the countryظآs ailing economy back on track was a main factor of the break-up. At the same time, social trust is declining in Europeظآs largest economy. However, a possible new government under the conservative CDU/CSU alliance and its candidate for the chancellorship, Friedrich Merz, seems poised to exacerbate divisions rather than resolving them, the researchers say. The economic difficulties heighten uncertainty and discontent, the report argues ظô with migration emerging as the other major flashpoint. Rhetoric on economic scarcity is used to highlight tensions over migration, which are exploited by both the extreme right and left. That debate has been exacerbated by a recent deadly stabbing in which a migrant facing deportation from Germany is the main suspect. Yet immigration is essential to Germanyظآs future growth, the BGI report says: "Any future government will have to attempt to reconcile anti-immigrant attitudes with the social reality of integration and the economic necessity of attracting foreign-born workers." Merz is promising a hard line on migration in case of an election victory. Despite provoking outrage from other political parties, Merz on Wednesday (January 29) pushed through a vote in parliament on proposals for tightening immigration controls. "Current asylum and immigration policy jeopardizes the security of the people and the confidence of all of society in the state," the text of the motion by the CDU/CSU says. The passed proposal includes a request to the German government to turn back asylum seekers at Germany's borders. But even more incendiary in German politics has been Merz's willingness to break long-standing taboos and use votes from the far-right Alternative for Germany (AfD) in order to pass the motion. All long-established parties in the lower house of the German parliament, the Bundestag, had previously said they would not work with the AfD, with many Germans alarmed at the rise of the party in recent years in a country still scarred by its Nazi past. ---------------------------------------------- This text and the accompanying material (photos and graphics) are an offer from the Democracy News Alliance, a close co-operation between Agence France-Presse (AFP, France), Agenzia Nazionale Stampa Associata (ANSA, Italy), The Canadian Press (CP, Canada), Deutsche Presse-Agentur (dpa, Germany) and PA Media (PA, UK). All recipients can use this material without the need for a separate subscription agreement with one or more of the participating agencies. This includes the recipient's right to publish the material in own products. The DNA content is an independent journalistic service that operates separately from the other services of the participating agencies. It is produced by editorial units that are not involved in the production of the agencies' main news services. Nevertheless, the editorial standards of the agencies and their assurance of completely independent, impartial and unbiased reporting also apply here. Effective, often painful reforms are urgently needed, but political and economic constraints make them difficult to implement, the researchers write. The 2024 BGI measures democratic accountability, delivery of public goods and state capacity on scale from 0 to 100. It analyses the years from 2000 to 2021. According to the report, Germany has lost ground on all three measures, with structural problems feasting since the "deceptively benign" years of the chancellorship of Angela Merkel (2005-2021). The Democracy Accountability Index score, for example, slid to 93 in 2021 from a near perfect 99 at the beginning of the century. The date "suggests that some of Germany's capacity and democratic accountability challenges were masked by economic growth, driven by the success of its export-oriented model during the 2010s", the report says. Chief among Germanyظآs challenges are economic troubles that have worsened in recent years, largely stemming from a lack of public investment during that period in areas such as digitalization and transport infrastructure. On February 23, Germans go to the polls early after the ruling three-party coalition consisting of the Social Democrats (SPD), the Greens and the liberal Free Democrats (FDP) collapsed in November. Intra-government fighting over how to get the countryظآs ailing economy back on track was a main factor of the break-up. At the same time, social trust is declining in Europeظآs largest economy. However, a possible new government under the conservative CDU/CSU alliance and its candidate for the chancellorship, Friedrich Merz, seems poised to exacerbate divisions rather than resolving them, the researchers say. The economic heighten uncertainty and discontent, the report argues ظô with migration emerging as the other major flashpoint. Rhetoric on economic scarcity is used to highlight tensions over migration, which are exploited by both the extreme right and left. That debate has been exacerbated by a recent deadly stabbing in which a migrant facing deporton from Germany is the main suspect. Yet immigration is essential to Germanyظآs future growth, the BGI report says: "Any future government will have to attempt to reconcile anti-immigrant attitudes with the social reality of integration and the economic necessity of attracting foreign-born workers." Merz is promising a hard line on migration in case of an election victory. Despite provoking outrage from other political parties, Merz on Wednesday (January 29) pushed through to vote in communion on proposals for tightening immigration controls. "Current asylum and immigration policy jeopardizes the security of the people and the confidence of all of society in the state," the text of the motion by the CDU/CSU says. The passed proposal includes a request to the German government to turn back asylum seekers at Germany's borders. But even more incendiary in German politics has been Merz's willingness to break long-standing taboos and use votes from the far-right Alternative for Germany (AfD) in order to pass the motion. All long-established parties in the lower house of the German majority, the Bundestag, had previously said they would not work with the AfD, with many Germans alarmed at the rise of the party in recent years in a country still scarred by its Nazi past. -------------------------------------------------- This text and the accompanying material (photos and graphics) are an offer from the Democracy News Alliance, a close co-operation between Agence France-Presse (AFP, France), National Print Agency Associate (ANSA, Italy), The Canadian Press (CP, Canada), Deutsche Presse-Agentur (dpa, Germany) and PA). This includes the container's right to publish the material in own products. title: German WPC specialist Naturinform engages experienced export director and manager
content: Redwitz a.d. Rodach  "Our sustainable wood composite material profiles have become increasingly popular around the globe. The great interest international visitors showed to our products at the world's leading trade fair BAU in January confirms that our opportunities in the global market are substantial. With Edward Robinson, we won over a proven expert who will support us in our efforts to further expand our export activities", says Horst Walther, Managing Partner of Naturinform. In addition to that, Yves Houbrechts joined Edward Robinson's team as the Sales Manager for the Netherlands and Belgium region. Houbrechts also has profound experience in the composite materials market and will make significant contributions to strengthen Naturinform's presence in these markets. According to Horst Walther, this internationalisation is a key strategy for future growth of the enterprise: "By integrating UPM products and expanding our own product series for co-extruded decking boards, we are laying the groundwork for permanently consolidating our position in the international market and opening up new business opportunities." Managing Director Pia Hobeck underlines the importance of innovation, product diversity and sustainability for their corporate strategy: "As a leading provider of WPC solutions with environment-friendly and versatile products, we will remain true to our strategy of inspiring even foreign markets and thus successfully growing in the long run." www.naturinform.com Presscontact:

title: Che impatto ha la GenAI sulla prevenzione delle frodi ظô il report Experian Insight
subtitle: Il 73% dei responsabili della gestione delle frodi concorda sul fatto che l'intelligenza artificiale generativa (GenAI) abbia alterato in modo permanente il panorama delle frodi. Il 58% delle imprese italiane ha registrato un aumento delle perdite dovute a frodi negli ultimi 12 mesi.
content: Experian, leader nel settore dei dati e della tecnologia, ha reso pubblico il suo ultimo report, condotto da Forrester Consulting, che illustra in modo dettagliato come l'Intelligenza Artificiale Generativa (GenAI) stia trasformando il panorama delle frodi. Lظآindagine, condotta tra 499 figure decisionali esperte nella lotta alle frodi, rivela un aumento delle perdite delle imprese attribuite ad azioni fraudolente, prima fra tutte il furto di identit├ب, e sottolinea l'importanza di adottare solide misure di sicurezza basate su machine learning (ML). La ricerca ha coinvolto otto paesi: Sudafrica, India, Norvegia, Danimarca, Spagna, Italia, Paesi Bassi e Germania.  Il report identifica innanzitutto unظآevoluzione significativa: il passaggio da azioni condotte da singoli truffatori a organizzazioni criminali ben strutturate e organizzate, una tendenza aggravata dall'avvento della GenAI. Quasi tre quarti (73%) degli intervistati in Italia e nel mondo concordano sul fatto che la GenAI abbia alterato in modo permanente il panorama delle frodi, rendendolo pi├╣ complesso e sofisticato. La GenAI ha anche consentito "l'industrializzazione delle frodi", ossia ha fornito ai truffatori gli strumenti per creare e implementare facilmente e su scala tattiche fraudolente come identit├ب sintetiche e deepfake. Inoltre, il 56% delle aziende fatica a identificare l'uso della GenAI in un attacco fraudolento e a quantificarne l'impatto sulle perdite, una percentuale che sale al 69% in Italia. Le aziende devono quindi adottare un approccio ancor pi├╣ proattivo alla prevenzione delle frodi attraverso lظآutilizzo di soluzioni avanzate basate sull'AI e l'integrazione di diversi strumenti specifici gestiti tramite piattaforme di orchestrazione, al fine di valutare con maggiore precisione i rischi di frode, migliorare l'accuratezza del rilevamento e ridurre i costi.  La crescente complessit├ب delle minacce di frode rende ancora pi├╣ cruciale la collaborazione con partner esterni e lظآimplementazione di tecnologie avanzate. Quasi quattro responsabili decisionali su cinque lo riconoscono, con il 78% che concorda sul fatto che la collaborazione con partner esterni sia fondamentale per una prevenzione efficace delle frodi (il 73% in Italia). Inoltre, il 63% delle aziende globali concorda sul fatto che la condivisione di dati e informazioni sulle frodi allظآinterno di un consorzio di organizzazioni sia un modo efficace per identificare le tendenze emergenti, con il 64% che ha registrato un ritorno positivo sugli investimenti (ROI) dalla propria partecipazione. Ci├▓ sottolinea l'importanza di superare le sfide legate alla condivisione dei dati per migliorare gli sforzi di rilevamento e prevenzione delle frodi. Si tratta di una posizione condivisa anche dalle imprese italiane con il 64% che ritiene efficace il ruolo dei consorzi e il 60% che ne ha tratto un ritorno positivo sugli investimenti. Tuttavia, la mancanza di standard condivisi sulla governance e sicurezza dei dati allظآinterno dei consorzi (58%) e i requisiti posti dalle normative nazionali (58%) sembrano porre un freno per sbloccare il pieno potenziale di queste reti. Per il 61% delle imprese italiane, ├ذ essenziale che i consorzi migliorino la propria abilit├ب di condividere dati in maniera sicura e efficiente, anche tra settori industriali diversi.  Date le crescenti minacce di frode e il ruolo critico del machine learning nella fase di prevenzione, l'introduzione di modelli basati su ML ├ذ stata riconosciuta come una priorit├ب assoluta dai responsabili aziendali intervistati. Oltre la met├ب delle aziende ammette di avere difficolt├ب nell'implementazione di strumenti di ML a causa di dati di addestramento insufficienti (53% nel mondo, 55% in Italia) e mancanza di dati di qualit├ب (54% nel mondo, 55% in Italia). Sviluppare modelli ML efficaci allظآinterno di ciascuna organizzazione richiede molte pi├╣ risorse rispetto all'utilizzo di modelli pre-addestrati e verificati. Utilizzando modelli ML standard personalizzabili, le aziende possono accelerare l'implementazione e ottenere valore pi├╣ velocemente. "In Italia, lظآimpatto delle frodi sui settori finanziario e delle telecomunicazioni ├ذ particolarmente evidente, con il 58% delle aziende locali intervistate che hanno subito perdite dovute alle frodi negli ultimi 12 mesi e il 71% che ha sottolineato una generale crescita dei tentativi di frode,ظإ ha commentato  Per consultare il report completo e conoscere i servizi di Experian per la prevenzione delle frodi:
en_title: What impact GenAI has on fraud prevention ظô Experian Insight report
en_content: Experian, leader in data and technology, published his latest report, led by Forrester Consulting, which illustrates in detail how Generative Artificial Intelligence (GenAI) is transforming the panorama of fraud. The investigation, conducted between 499 decision-makers in the fight against fraud, reveals an increase in business losses attributed to fraudulent actions, first of all identity theft, and emphasizes the importance of adopting solid safety measures based on machine learning (ML). The research involved eight countries: South Africa, India, Norway, Denmark, Spain, Italy, the Netherlands and Germany. The report first identifies a significant evolution: the passage from actions conducted by individual scammers to well structured and organized criminal organizations, a tendency aggravated by the advent of the GenAI. Almost three quarters (73%) of respondents in Italy and the world agree that GenAI has permanently altered the fraud landscape, making it more complex and sophisticated. GenAI has also allowed "industrialization of fraud", i.e. it provided scammers with tools to easily and easily create and implement fraudulent tactics such as synthetic and deepfake identity. Moreover, 56% of companies are struggling to identify the use of GenAI in a fraudulent attack and to quantify its impact on losses, a percentage rising to 69% in Italy. Companies must therefore take an even more proactive approach to fraud prevention through the use of advanced AI-based solutions and the integration of several specific tools managed through orchestration platforms, in order to better assess fraud risks, improve detection accuracy and reduce costs. The growing complexity of fraud threats makes collaboration with external partners even more crucial and the implementation of advanced technologies. Almost four decision-makers on five recognize it, with 78% agreeing that collaboration with external partners is essential for effective fraud prevention (73% in Italy). In addition, 63% of global companies agree that sharing data and information on fraud within a group of organisations is an effective way to identify emerging trends, with 64% registered a positive return on investments (ROI) from their participation. This emphasises the importance of overcoming data sharing challenges to improve fraud detection and prevention efforts. It is also a position shared by Italian companies with 64% that believes effective the role of consortia and 60% that has taken a positive return on investments. However, the lack of shared standards on governance and data security within consortia (58%) and the requirements set by national regulations (58%) seem to put a stop to unlock the full potential of these networks. For 61% of Italian companies, it is essential that consortia improve their ability to share data safely and efficiently, even among different industries. Given the increasing threats of fraud and the critical role of machine learning in the prevention phase, the introduction of ML-based models has been recognised as an absolute priority by respondents. Over half of companies admit to having difficulty in implementing ML tools due to inadequate training data (53% worldwide, 55% in Italy) and lack of quality data (54% worldwide, 55% in Italy). Developing effective ML models within each organization requires much more resources than using pre-trained and verified models. Using customizable standard ML models, companies can accelerate implementation and get value faster. "In Italy, the impact of fraud on the financial and telecommunications sectors is particularly evident, with 58% of local companies interviewed that have suffered losses due to fraud over the past 12 months and 71% that has underlined a general increase in fraud attempts," commented To consult the full report and get to know the services of Experian for fraud prevention:
en_subtitle: 73% of fraud managers agree that artificial intelligence (GenAI) has permanently altered the fraud scene. 58% of Italian companies recorded an increase in fraud losses over the past 12 months.

title: Kioxia e Sandisk presentano la tecnologia delle memorie flash 3D di nuova generazione che raggiungono velocit├ب dellظآinterfaccia NAND pari a 4,8 Gb/s
content: Questo comunicato stampa include contenuti multimediali. Visualizzare lظآintero comunicato qui: Presentata allظآISSCC 2025, la tecnologia avanzata delle memorie flash 3D, insieme allظآinnovativa tecnologia del legame diretto tra il wafer del CMOS e quello dellظآarray di celle (CBA), incorpora uno degli standard pi├╣ recenti sullظآinterfaccia, Toggle DDR6.0 per la memoria flash NAND, e utilizza il protocollo SCA (Separate Command Address), un nuovo metodo di immissione dellظآindirizzo di comando dellظآinterfaccia nonch├ر la tecnologia PI-LTT (Power Isolated Low-Tapped Termination) che ├ذ fondamentale per ridurre ulteriormente il consumo di potenza. title: Experian: boom del Buy Now Pay Later a gennaio con +27,5%, moda e under-30 trainano la domanda
subtitle: ظت	Il BNPL si conferma una soluzione di pagamento in costante crescita con il +30% nel 2024 rispetto al 2023. Un trend che segue la forte espansione degli anni precedenti (+100% nel 2023 e +206% nel 2022).
content: Il Buy Now, Pay Later si afferma ormai stabilmente come soluzione di pagamento apprezzata da consumatori italiani. Lo conferma l'ultimo Rapporto sul Credito di Experian, data tech company, secondo cui a gennaio 2025 il BNPL ├ذ cresciuto del 27,5% rispetto allo stesso mese del 2024. Nel complesso, il 2024 ha sancito come il BNPL sia ormai una forma di finanziamento irrinunciabile, con una crescita del +30% rispetto al 2023 dopo 3 anni di forte espansione anno su anno: nel 2023, il BNPL ├ذ cresciuto del +99,98% e nel 2022 ├ذ cresciuto del +206% rispetto al 2021. Gli acquisti tramite BNPL si concentrano sui prodotti di abbigliamento: lظآindustria della moda copre lظآ80,9% degli utilizzi di BNPL, ma negli ultimi tre mesi ├ذ cresciuta anche la popolarit├ب degli acquisti di articoli per attivit├ب outdoor (7,5%). Seguono tra le motivazioni lظآacquisto di articoli sportivi (3,57%) e lظآutilizzo per spese di estetica (2,31%) o gioielli (2,15%). L'importo medio nazionale delle richieste BNPL ├ذ di 149 euro. ظ£Il BNPL non ├ذ una moda passeggera, ma rappresenta ormai una forma di finanziamento in costante espansione nel mondo dei pagamenti digitali; la crescita del +30% anno su anno registrata nel 2024 conferma la solidit├ب di questo trendظإ commenta   Il segmento dei Millennial (dallظآet├ب compresa tra 30 e 45 anni), pur rappresentando la quota maggiore di richieste (39%), mostra una crescita annua pi├╣ contenuta (+22,4%) e un calo mensile pi├╣ marcato (-8,3%), suggerendo una possibile saturazione del mercato in questa fascia d'et├ب.
en_title: Experian: Buy Now Pay Later boom in January with +27.5%, fashion and under-30 towing demand
en_content: The Buy Now, Pay Later is now firmly established as a payment solution appreciated by Italian consumers. This confirms the latest Experian Credit Report, data tech company, according to which in January 2025 BNPL grew by 27.5% compared to the same month of 2024. Overall, 2024 has stated that BNPL is now an irrelevant form of financing, with an increase of +30% compared to 2023 after 3 years of strong year-on-year expansion: in 2023, BNPL grew by +99.98% and in 2022 grew by +206% compared to 2021. Purchases through BNPL focus on clothing products: the fashion industry covers 80.9% of BNPLظآs usages, but in the last three months the popularity of outdoor articles (7.5%) has also grown. Among the reasons are the purchase of sports items (3,57%) and the use for cosmetic expenses (2,31%) or jewelry (2,15%). The average national amount of BNPL requests is EUR 149. ظ£The BNPL is not a light fashion, but it is now a form of constantly expanding financing in the world of digital payments; the increase of +30% year on year recorded in 2024 confirms the solidity of this trend" comments The segment of the Millennials (from the age between 30 and 45 years), while representing the greater share of demands (39%), shows a more contained annual growth (+22.4%) and a more marked monthly decrease (-8.3%), suggesting a possible saturation of the market in this age group.
en_subtitle: ظت The BNPL confirms a growing payment solution with 30% in 2024 compared to 2023. A trend that follows the strong expansion of the previous years (+100% in 2023 and +206% in 2022).

title: DIA Europe 2025 to Address EU Regulatory Reforms and How to Advance Global Healthcare Harmonization
content: The continent's premier neutral healthcare conference, DIA Europe 2025 will host more than 300 speakers from over 150 organizations and present over 100 topics across 10 content tracks ظ¤ including two, clinical trials innovation and global insights, that have been reworked from previous years to better reflect current needs and challenges. These discussions will shape policies that strengthen pharmaceutical development and patient care, with sessions examining environmental impact, regulatory digitalization, artificial intelligence (AI), and critical reforms under the new EU pharmaceutical legislation. Representatives from the European Medicines Agency (EMA), the European Commission, national competent authorities, notified bodies, academia, health technology assessment bodies, patient advocacy groups, and over 200 industry organizations will also contribute perspectives on enhancing healthcare delivery across borders. "If we are to bridge gaps, drive progress, and shape policies that improve patient outcomes, we must achieve harmonization among stakeholders from every sector of the healthcare ecosystem," said Ania Mitan, DIA's Senior Vice President and Managing Director for Europe, the Middle East, Africa, and India (EMEAI). "DIA Europe 2025 creates opportunities for that to happen by providing an environment where meaningful solutions emerge from diverse perspectives and shared expertise." Two healthcare leaders will deliver keynote presentations on how technology and patient care intersect to streamline treatments. Dr. Peiling Yap, Chief Scientist at HealthAI, will share strategies for implementing responsible AI standards that promote equitable, sustainable healthcare solutions. Simon Rasalingham, CEO and Chairman of behold.ai, will demonstrate how emerging diagnostic technologies can transform patient outcomes through early detection and improved treatment pathways. The conference's signature DIAmond sessions will address key developments in European healthcare policy. During the EU Regulatory Town Hall, Emer Cooke, Executive Director of the EMA, will join Mar├صa Jes├║s Lamas D├صaz, Executive Director of the Spanish Agency for Medicines and Medical Devices (AEMPS), and Steffen Thirstrup, the EMA's Chief Medical Officer, for in-depth discussions on EU policy changes. Additional sessions will feature speakers from Amgen, AstraZeneca, Bayer, GSK, MSD, Roche, Sanofi, and Novartis, among others, and focus on frameworks for the global digitalization of medicine regulation, establishing sustainability standards, strengthening patient engagement practices, and advancing European healthcare initiatives. DIA Europe 2025 will also introduce targeted programs to drive innovation and inclusion in healthcare. A startup accelerator on March 18 will connect emerging companies with regulatory authorities to accelerate development pathways. Interactive DIAlogue sessions will explore sustainable partnerships and develop strategies for including underserved populations in clinical trials. To register or view the conference program, visit  DIA is a leading global non-profit life science membership association that drives collaboration in drug, device, and diagnostics development in pursuit of a healthier world. Founded in 1964 with headquarters in Washington, D.C., and offices in Europe and Asia, DIA provides unparalleled networking opportunities, educational resources, scientific research publications, and professional development programs to members in more than 80 countries. Learn more at

title: Board of Eigenmann & Veronelli Welcomes Two New Independent Directors to Support Group Growth
content: Eigenmann & Veronelli, Italy's leading and internationally focused distributor of specialty chemicals and food ingredients, today announces the appointment of Mario Paterlini and Hidde van der Wal as independent Non-Executive Directors of the board of Eigenmann & Veronelli S.p.A. This press release features multimedia. View the full release here: Photographed (Left to Right): Mario Paterlini, Hidde van der Wal (Photo: Business Wire) With effect as of February 2025, the two new Non-Executive Directors will join EVظآs existing five-member board. Their addition marks a significant milestone in EVظآs overarching strategy to enhance corporate governance, bolster expertise, and support sustained international growth, aligning with the groupظآs strategic vision. As independent members, they will introduce fresh perspectives and industry-leading best practices, further guiding EV toward excellence and innovation. Mario Paterlini has pursued a highly successful career in the chemicals industry where, since 2010, he has been serving as CEO of Gruppo Sapio. He has extensive international experience, particularly in the United States and the EMEA region. He is deeply versed in the themes of corporate governance, M&A, change management, and continuous productivity and development programming. He also sits as an independent director on the board of Vitale Barberis Canonico and is President of Gruppo Idrogeno Vettore Energetico at Federchimica. Hidde van der Wal has garnered years of leadership experience in the chemicals distribution industry, as CEO of Barentz in the period 2000 til 2023. During his tenure, he led the growth of Barentz throughout Europe and initiated its expansion into the Americas and Asia into a true global acting specialty distributor. ظ£We are thrilled to welcome Mario Paterlini and Hidde van der Wal to our Board of Directors,ظإ commented Group Chairman Christian Veronelli. "Their extensive experience will strengthen EV's governance and support our international growth ambitions, in line with our strategic vision." "I am confident that Mario Paterlini and Hidde van der Wal will make a valuable contribution to EV's board of directors," added CEO Gabriele Bonomi. "Both bring extensive international experience, and a diverse skill set, which will significantly enhance our competitiveness. Their unique perspectives, combined with their expertise, will further strengthen our governance model, supporting the continued growth and development of the Group as an international solutions provider."  Founded in 1910, Eigenmann & Veronelli Group is an international solutions provider of specialty chemicals and food ingredients. Headquartered in Rho, Italy, EV has a direct presence in Italy, Iberia, Turkey, and the U.A.E. and a commercial reach in more than 45 countries. In 2024, EV generated a consolidated turnover of 347 million euros with more than 350 employees. With over a century of experience, EV is synonymous with effectiveness and efficiency, combining local market knowledge with chemical innovations, and offering a high-quality and diversified portfolio of specialty chemicals and ingredients as well as tailor-made application, marketing and supply chain solutions, technical and formulation support, and comprehensive regulatory know-how for a wide range of industries. title: Servizi di ingegneria-architettura a livelli pre-Covid, -18,4%
subtitle: Centro studi ingegneri, valgono 1,4 miliardi, cala effetto bonus
content:
Il Pnrr e i bonus edilizi "hanno
rappresentato per il nostro Paese un'importante opportunit├ب di
sviluppo e investimenti che hanno garantito, nel 2022 e nel
2023, una significativa crescita economica che per├▓ non si ├ذ
dimostrata stabile e duratura", tanto che, "secondo i dati
elaborati dal Centro studi del Consiglio nazionale degli
ingegneri, le stazioni appaltanti hanno pubblicato, nell'anno
appena concluso, bandi di gara per servizi di ingegneria e
architettura per un ammontare complessivo di circa 1,4 miliardi
di euro, il 18,4% in meno rispetto al 2023". E si tratta,
sottolineano i professionisti, "di un valore allineato con
quelli degli anni pre-pandemia" da Covid.  
Sebbene, recita la nota, il peso delle gare del Pnrr si sia
mantenuto costante rispetto al 2023 (circa il 13%), nel 2024
sono nettamente calati gli importi destinati ai servizi di
ingegneria e architettura, considerando tutte le tipologie di
gara, a conferma di una inversione di tendenza. E, si evideniza,
"aggiungendo anche gli importi destinati ai soli servizi di
ingegneria nelle gare di appalto integrato, l'ammontare
complessivo delle somme poste a base d'asta ├ذ passato da 2,6
miliardi del 2023 a 1,6 miliardi nell'anno appena concluso". 
Per il presidente del Consiglio nazionale degli ingegneri Angelo
Domenico Perrini, il rapporto testimonia come l'effetto benefico
di Pnrr e bonus edilizi sia "ormai pressoch├ر svanito, aprendo
scenari preoccupanti per i professionisti italiani. In questo
contesto il Consiglio nazionale resta fermo sulla propria
posizione che mira a mettere in atto tutti gli interventi
possibili per valorizzare al massimo la figura e il lavoro dei
professionisti. Questa azione non pu├▓ che avere come stella
polare la difesa e l'estensione dell'applicazione della legge
sull'equo compenso" a tutti i committenti dei professionisti (la
disciplina del 2023 impone l'obbligo della giusta remunerazione
per i lavoratori autonomi alle imprese con oltre 50 dipendenti o
con almeno 10 milioni di fatturato, ndr). Riproduzione riservata ┬ر Copyright ANSA

title: Private Equity: come ha battuto i mercati quotati durante le crisi degli ultimi 25 anni
content:
Negli ultimi quattro anni, i mercati finanziari sono stati
soggetti a una serie di shock che hanno avuto implicazioni di vasta
portata. Dalla pandemia globale alle recenti tensioni geopolitiche,
il contesto di mercato ├ذ stato caratterizzato da incertezza.┬ب┬ب┬ب
				Inoltre, l'inflazione record e uno dei cicli di rialzo dei tassi
pi├╣ rapidi degli ultimi quattro decenni hanno ulteriormente messo
alla prova investitori e aziende. Nonostante queste turbolenze, il ظ£l private equity globale ha sovraperformato l'MSCI ACWI Gross
Index durante ciascuna delle principali fasi di turbolenza, con un
extra-rendimento medio annualizzato dell'8%. Anche nella fase pi├╣
profonda della crisi delle dot.com, in cui il private equity ├ذ
stato messo alla prova a causa della sua esposizione alle societ├ب
tecnologiche in fase iniziale al centro della bolla, ├ذ comunque
andato meglio rispetto ai mercati pubbliciظإ evidenziano gli esperti
di Si tratta di circostanze fortunate o di un successo
strutturale? La tipica struttura dei fondi di private equity prevede un
capitale bloccato, fornendo ai General Partner (GP) un pool di
capitale stabile e prevedibile. I GP non sono costretti a vendere
asset nelle fasi ribassiste del mercato e possono richiamare il
capitale per investire a valutazioni pi├╣ basse. C'├ذ anche un
allineamento degli interessi attraverso una compensazione basata
sui risultati sia a livello di GP che di societ├ب in portafoglio.┬ب┬ب┬ب
				Inoltre, le societ├ب di private equity si concentrano in genere su
settori meno ciclici come la sanit├ب, i servizi alle imprese e la
tecnologia, limitando al contempo l'esposizione alle banche e
all'industria pesante. Preferiscono modelli di business meno
volatili che generano entrate ricorrenti. Infine, la natura dei rendimenti del private equity, che
riflettono in parte i guadagni non realizzati, contribuisce a
rendere meno volatili i rendimenti stessi.
en_title: Private Equity: as it has beaten the markets listed during the crisis of the last 25 years
en_content:
In the last four years, financial markets have been
subject to a series of shocks that have had extensive implications
flow. From global pandemic to recent geopolitical tensions,
the market context was characterized by uncertainty.
In addition, record inflation and one of the rate rise cycles
faster than the last four decades have further put
to test investors and companies. Despite these turbulence, the ظ£private equity global overperformed MSCI ACWI Gross
Index during each of the main phases of turbulence, with a
8% annual average yield. Even in the most
deep in the crisis of dot.com, where private equity is
was tested due to its exposure to companies
technological in the initial phase at the center of the bubble, is however
better compared to public markets,ظإ said experts
These are lucky circumstances or a success
structural? The typical structure of private equity funds provides a
blocked capital, providing General Partner (GP) a pool of
stable and predictable capital. GPs are not forced to sell
assets in the lower stages of the market and can recall the
capital to invest in lower ratings. There is also a
alignment of interest through a compensation based
on both GP and portfolio companies.
In addition, private equity companies generally focus on
less cyclical sectors such as health, business services and
technology, while limiting exposure to banks and
to the heavy industry. Prefer less business models
birds that generate recurring income. Finally, the nature of private equity returns, which
partly reflect unrealised earnings, contributes to
make yields less volatile.

title: Ecco le regole Inps per pensioni influencer e youtuber
subtitle: Fava, 'obiettivo promuovere lavoro in regola'
content: Anche gli influencer e gli youtuber devono andare in pensone: hanno l'obbligo di versare i contributi previdenziali e di pensare alla propria previdenza. Lo ricorda l'Inps con una circolare nella quale chiarisce quale sia l'inquadramento per ogni figura a seconda del tipo di lavoro che svolge. La circolare riguarda l'inquadramento previdenziale e contributivo dei creatori di contenuti digitali (DCC), un settore in rapida evoluzione che coinvolge soprattutto i giovani e fornisce linee guida chiare e pratiche per facilitare la gestione degli obblighi fiscali e contributivi legati a queste nuove professioni. L'obiettivo della circolare - si legge in una nota - "├ذ quello di adattare le normative esistenti alle specifiche esigenze delle professioni legate all'economia digitale, che spesso sfuggono a schemi consolidati. Descrive le caratteristiche distintive dell'attivit├ب di creazione di contenuti, le diverse modalit├ب di svolgimento e remunerazione, e i vari rapporti di lavoro che possono sorgere tra i DCC, le aziende e le agenzie intermediarie. Particolare attenzione ├ذ riservata alla figura del creator, comprendente influencer, youtuber, streamer, podcaster e pro gamer, con l'intento di fornire un quadro flessibile e comprensibile che possa evolvere con il settore" . "La circolare Inps sull'inquadramento previdenziale di creator digitali ed influencer - spiega il presidente dell'Istituto, Gabriele Fava, ├ذ un segno concreto dell'attenzione dell'Istituto ai giovani e alle nuove professioni sui temi previdenziali e al contempo risulta coerente con l'obiettivo di promuovere lavoro in regola in un mercato, quello dei lavori digitali, dove c'├ذ grande rischio di speculazione. Questa iniziativa, che ha trovato la valutazione positiva del Ministero del Lavoro, rientra nel pi├╣ ampio progetto di promozione della cultura previdenziale che caratterizzer├ب i prossimi anni e punta a portare a bordo il maggior numero di giovani". Riproduzione riservata ┬ر Copyright ANSA
en_title: Here are the rules Inps for pension influencer and youtuber
en_content: Influencers and youtuber also have to go to think: have the obligation to pay social security contributions and to think about their own pension. It is remembered by the Inps with a circular in which it clarifies what the frame for each figure is according to the type of work it carries out. The circular covers the previdential and contributory framework of digital content creators (DCC), a rapidly evolving sector that mainly involves young people and provides clear and practical guidelines to facilitate the management of tax and tax obligations related to these new professions. The aim of the circular - we read in a note - "is to adapt existing regulations to the specific needs of the professions related to the digital economy, which often escape consolidated schemes. It describes the distinctive features of content creation, the different modes of performance and remuneration, and the various working relationships that can arise between DCCs, companies and intermediary agencies. Particular attention is paid to the figure of the creator, including influencers, youtuber, streamers, podcasters and pro gamers, with the aim of providing a flexible and understandable framework that can evolve with the industry." "The circular Inps on the previdential framework of digital creators and influencers - explains the President of the Institute, Gabriele Fava, is a concrete sign of the Institute's attention to young people and new professions This initiative, which has found the positive evaluation of the Ministry of Labour, is part of the broader project of promotion of social culture that will characterize the coming years and aims to bring on board the greater number of young people". Reproduction reserved ┬ر Copyright ANSA
en_subtitle: Fava, 'to promote work in rule'

title: Sar├ب il generale Vadal├ب il commissario per Terra dei fuochi
subtitle: Lo annuncia la premier
content: Sar├ب il generale, Giuseppe Vadal├ب, il Commissario straordinario per la Terra dei fuochi, con "il compito di coordinare la bonifica del territorio, affidandogli poteri straordinari legati alle attivit├ب specificatamente indicate dalla sentenza della Cedu". Lo ha annunciato, a quanto si apprende, la premier Giorgia Meloni nel Consiglio dei ministri che ha approvato il decreto legge sulla Pubblica Amministrazione. In questo provvedimento, ha spiegato Meloni, "il governo ha voluto inserire delle norme che puntano ad affrontare e risolvere l'annosa questione legata all'inquinamento ambientale nella Terra dei fuochi". Riproduzione riservata ┬ر Copyright ANSA
en_title: It will be General Vadal├ب the commissioner for Earth of the fires
en_content: It will be the general, Giuseppe Vadal├ب, the Extraordinary Commissioner for the Land of Fireworks, with "the task of coordinating the land reclamation, entrusting it with extraordinary powers linked to the activities specifically indicated by the judgment of the ECHR". It has announced, to what is learned, Prime Minister Giorgia Meloni in the Council of Ministers that has approved the bill on Public Administration. In this measure, Meloni explained, "the government wanted to incorporate rules that aim to address and solve the serious issue related to environmental pollution in the Land of Fires".
